title: SPARC - Attune NxT Set-up for Milli-metabolic Bead Assay Acquisition
author: J Paul Robinson

steps.title: Check the waste and If the...
steps.instruction: Check the waste and If the waste is full, disconnect the tank and dispose of the waste down the sink with running water. Add 200 mL of 5% bleach to the tank and reconnect to the Attune NxT. Fill the Focusing Fluid tank from the focusing fluid cube.

steps.title: Check and fill as needed the...
steps.instruction: Check and fill as needed the shutdown solution reservoir and the wash solution reservoir.

steps.title: Also check the waste and focusing...
steps.instruction: Also check the waste and focusing fluid reservoirs at the plate sampler station.

steps.title: At the workstation, click on instrument...
steps.instruction: At the workstation, click on instrument > start-up at the top of the screen.

steps.title: When start-up is complete, the indicator...
steps.instruction: When start-up is complete, the indicator lights at the instrument will be green.

steps.title: When the plate finishes, right click on the experiment
steps.instruction: When the plate finishes, right click on the experiment.

steps.title: Copy files onto the appropriate directory
steps.instruction: Copy files onto the appropriate directory

steps.title: Once data files are analyzed in...
steps.instruction: Once data files are analyzed in MPLEX, follow the MPLEX protocol to send data for depositing to NIH. See this protocol for details: SPARC - Analysis of multiplexed bead data using MPLEX software by J Paul Robinson
